# Project Map

**Last Updated:** 2026-05-15 (auto-generated by /end)
**Project:** plannotator (custom fork of backnotprop/plannotator)

---

## ⚡ Quick Reference (Start Here)

**What:** Plan review UI for Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, Gemini, and Copilot CLIs. Intercepts `ExitPlanMode` via PermissionRequest hooks; lets users annotate plans, request changes, or approve. Also handles code review for git diffs and annotation of arbitrary markdown/HTML files.

**Tech:** TypeScript + Bun runtime + React (Vite) + Tailwind 4. Monorepo with Bun workspaces.

**Start:** `bun run dev:hook` (plan review) or `bun run dev:review` (code review).

**Top 5 files to know:**
1. `apps/hook/server/index.ts` — CLI entry point; routes args to plan/review/annotate/archive subcommands; reads hook events from stdin and prints `hookSpecificOutput` decisions
2. `packages/server/index.ts` — Bun server shared between Claude Code and OpenCode plugins (plan review server, all `/api/*` endpoints)
3. `packages/editor/App.tsx` — Plan review React app entry; orchestrates Viewer + annotations + multi-LLM auto-review pill
4. `packages/ui/components/AutoReviewCountdown.tsx` — Multi-LLM deliberation pill; countdown → council.py → apply-review → red-team → policy gate → auto-approve
5. `packages/server/review.ts` — Code review server; handles git diff fetching, AI review jobs, agent providers (Claude, Codex, Tour)

---

## Tech Stack

- **Language:** TypeScript (strict)
- **Runtime:** Bun (>=1.3) for compiled binaries; Node for Pi extension
- **Frontend:** React 18, Vite 6, Tailwind CSS 4
- **State:** Zustand-style refs + cookies (per-session, since each hook spawns its own port)
- **Markdown:** marked + DOMPurify (HTML blocks), GitHub alerts, GFM extras
- **Highlighting:** highlight.js bundled
- **Compression:** built-in CompressionStream (deflate-raw) for URL sharing
- **AI providers:** `@plannotator/ai` package — OpenRouter, Anthropic SDK, Codex SDK
- **Build:** Single-file HTML output via vite-plugin-singlefile, then embedded into the compiled Bun binary

## Directory Structure

```
plannotator/
├── apps/
│   ├── hook/                  - Claude Code plugin (CLI entry, marketplace metadata)
│   │   ├── server/index.ts    - CLI dispatcher (PermissionRequest, review, annotate, archive…)
│   │   ├── commands/          - Slash commands (plannotator-review, plannotator-annotate)
│   │   └── dist/              - Built single-file HTML (index.html, review.html)
│   ├── opencode-plugin/       - OpenCode plugin entry + bundled HTML
│   ├── pi-extension/          - Standalone Node.js server (Pi extension)
│   ├── vscode-extension/      - VS Code extension (opens plans in editor tabs)
│   ├── review/                - Standalone Vite app for the code-review editor (dev only)
│   ├── marketing/             - plannotator.ai (Astro 5, static)
│   ├── paste-service/         - Short-URL sharing service (Bun/CF Workers)
│   ├── codex/, gemini/, copilot/ - Slash-command shims per CLI
│   └── skills/                - Agentskills.io packages (review/annotate/compound/setup-goal/visual-explainer)
├── packages/
│   ├── server/                - Bun server shared by Claude Code + OpenCode plugins
│   ├── ui/                    - React components, hooks, theme, shortcut registry
│   ├── ai/                    - Provider-agnostic AI backbone (providers, sessions, endpoints)
│   ├── shared/                - Runtime-agnostic types/utilities (used by both Bun and Pi)
│   ├── editor/                - Plan-review app (App.tsx + shortcut composition)
│   ├── review-editor/         - Code-review UI (App.tsx + dock, components, demo data)
│   └── automations/           - Bundled hook automations (plan + review libraries)
└── legacy/                    - Pre-monorepo reference code
```

## Critical Files

**Configuration:**
- `package.json` — root version (currently **0.19.16**), workspaces, top-level scripts
- `apps/hook/.claude-plugin/plugin.json` — Claude Code plugin manifest
- `~/.claude/settings.json` (user-side) — points the hook at `~/.ipe/ipe`
- `~/.ipe/ipe` — bash wrapper that injects `bypassPermissions` on approve

**Core logic:**
- `apps/hook/server/index.ts` — CLI dispatcher; the **only** place that prints `hookSpecificOutput` to stdout
- `packages/server/index.ts` — plan review server (`/api/plan`, `/api/approve`, `/api/deny`, `/api/multi-llm-review-stream`, `/api/apply-review`, `/api/red-team-review-stream`, `/api/policies/evaluate`, `/api/external-annotations`)
- `packages/server/review.ts` — code review server with new `code-nav` peek view and `agent-review-message.ts` shim
- `packages/server/agent-review-message.ts` — upstream PR #675 shim; moved here when `buildCodexReviewUserMessage` was extracted from `codex-review.ts`
- `packages/ui/contexts/AutoReviewContext.tsx` — state machine for multi-LLM deliberation (phases: idle → countdown → deliberating → applying → approval_countdown → done)
- `packages/ui/utils/planDiffEngine.ts` — line-level diff between plan versions for the badge + diff viewer

**Deployment:**
- `~/.ipe/ipe.bin` (94.2MB, compiled Bun binary) — the binary Claude Code's PermissionRequest hook executes
- `~/.local/bin/plannotator` — CLI mirror of the same binary
- `~/.ipe/ipe.bin.pre-merge` — rollback to pre-v0.19.16-merge build (kept this session only)

## Quick Start Commands

```bash
# Plan-review dev (hot reload)
bun run dev:hook

# Code-review dev
bun run dev:review

# Marketing site dev
bun run dev:marketing

# Full rebuild + reinstall the binary the Claude Code hook actually runs
bun install
bun run --cwd apps/review build       # only when packages/review-editor or packages/ui changed
bun run build:hook                    # builds plan editor HTML, copies review.html
bun build apps/hook/server/index.ts --compile --outfile ~/.ipe/ipe.bin
cp ~/.ipe/ipe.bin ~/.local/bin/plannotator
```

**Critical build invariant:** `build:hook` copies pre-built HTML from `apps/review/dist/`. Any change in `packages/ui/`, `packages/editor/`, or `packages/review-editor/` requires rebuilding `apps/review` first, otherwise the hook ships stale UI bytes.

## Architecture Highlights

- **Two server runtimes, one API surface.** `packages/server/` (Bun, used by Claude Code + OpenCode) and `apps/pi-extension/server/` (Node `http`, used by the Pi extension) mirror each other. Pi tends to drift behind — see auto-memory.
- **Hook output is the contract.** Stdout from `apps/hook/server/index.ts` is the only payload Claude Code sees on a PermissionRequest. Approve emits `{behavior:"allow", permissionDecisionReason, updatedPermissions}`. Deny emits `{behavior:"deny", message}`. The IPE wrapper post-processes to inject `bypassPermissions` without dropping fields.
- **Cookies, not localStorage.** Each hook invocation runs on a random port, so settings persist via cookies that work across origins.
- **Auto-review pipeline is decoupled.** `b8a7ef5` separated `approval_countdown` from the apply-promise chain to avoid `handleApprove` reading stale markdown after the multi-LLM merge. State lives in `AutoReviewContext`.
- **Plan history is automatic.** Every plan saves to `~/.plannotator/history/{project}/{slug}/NNN.md` on arrival, before the UI loads. Powers the version browser and plan-diff badge.
- **HTML output is embedded in the binary.** Single-file HTML produced by Vite is `import`-attribute-loaded by Bun at build time. Means you cannot live-reload the UI against a running binary; you have to rebuild and re-run.

## External Integrations

- **OpenRouter** — multi-LLM deliberation (Gemini, GPT-4.1 Mini, Grok, DeepSeek, Mistral). Pricing in `AutoReviewCountdown.tsx`
- **Anthropic SDK** — Claude as a code-review agent provider
- **Codex SDK** — GPT-5.1 Mini (our default; upstream now defaults to GPT-5.4)
- **council.py** (sidecar) — orchestrates the multi-LLM deliberation; binary calls it via `Bun.spawn`
- **Jina Reader** — URL→markdown conversion for `plannotator annotate https://...`
- **Obsidian / Bear / Octarine** — note integrations on approve
- **paste service** — `plannotator-paste.plannotator.workers.dev` for short URL share links
